SEARCH
Package service

Class SmartCityService

java.lang.Object
service.SmartCityService
public class SmartCityService extends Object
SmartCityService: realistic sample data for Hotels, Restaurants, Cars, Attractions, Events, Passes, Tours. Includes 20 items per category for Frankfurt, London, Paris, and New York. Filtering API: getXForCity(String city) - uses equalsIgnoreCase to match the city field.
